meaning: bring your own 自带酒或食物
examples: I'll finish working at: and get home byo 'clock.
Method The contents of Fe and dextran were determined respectively byo-phenanthroline and anthrone methods.
What else you bring depends on the circumstances of your bike tour (think available bathrooms - will you need to BYO toilet paper?)
They tend to offer set menus with BYO wine in an atmospheric setting, but some allow you to order a la carte.
